userMessage: Set edge trigger on CH1 rising at 1V normal mode

response.text:

Reason: exact SCPI materialization is still insufficient for the full request. I have verified records for:
- `TRIGger:{A|B}:TYPe`
- `TRIGger:{A|B}:EDGE:SOUrce`
- `TRIGger:{A|B}:EDGE:SLOpe`
- `TRIGger:{A|B}:LEVel:CH<x>`

But the required `materialize_scpi_commands` step did not resolve placeholders for:

- edge source
- edge slope
- channel level

So I cannot provide an as-is applyable flow without guessing. If you want, on the next turn I can build it once those concrete commands are materialized.
